.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:447:- `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:454:- Any operation that writes `state.json` MUST hold `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:455:- Agents MUST write state updates to `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:458:- After any event append, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:462:`events.jsonl` is append-only and is the source of truth for workflow state and event ordering. Each line is one valid JSON object. Do not rewrite previous events unless the user explicitly requests repair of a malformed log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:486:- New event ids MUST be allocated while holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:487:- The next id MUST be computed as `max(event.id) + 1` from the valid events already present in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:488:- Agents MUST NOT allocate event ids from `state.json.last_event_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:489:- After appending an event, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:528:1. Acquire `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:529:2. Validate `events.jsonl` and reconstruct the task lifecycle from events for the target `task_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:531:4. If an active owner exists, abort the claim, release `locks/journal.lock`, and report the owner.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:532:5. If the task is open or recovered, append a `task_claimed` event while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:533:6. Update `state.json.active_agent`, `state.json.current_task`, `state.json.status`, and `state.json.last_event_id` while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:534:7. Validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json`, then release `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:567:  "resource": "state.json",
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:577:Any operation that appends to `events.jsonl` or writes `state.json` MUST first acquire `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:582:mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:587:The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:599:The lock owner MUST hold `journal.lock` for the full read-check-write-validation sequence covering `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:603:Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:605:If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. The rebuild MUST use the atomic state write procedure, and the agent MUST append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:607:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:609:If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST preserve the original log, create a repair artifact describing the malformed line and proposed repair, and set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:620:4. Update `state.json` with the current task, status, active agent, and last event id.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:629:Completion should write a `completed` event and update `state.json.status` to `completed` unless the workflow remains open for the other agent.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:635:- A `codex_ready` event in `events.jsonl`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:694:- Hold `locks/journal.lock` for all `events.jsonl` and `state.json` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:700:- Update `state.json`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:848:/bin/bash -lc 'rtk tail -n 30 .omc/collaboration/events.jsonl' in /home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:863:1. `state_rebuilt` 归 `STATUS_OVERRIDE_EVENTS`，事件 `status` 使用“从有效事件流重建出的最终 status”，不是信任损坏或缺失的旧 `state.json`。它的作用是审计 + 推进 `last_event_id`，不改变业务状态。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:864:2. `owner.json` 包含 `pid` / `hostname`，`task_id: null` 可以接受；`heartbeat_at` 对短操作仍写初始值即可，不要求持续心跳。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:867:唯一补充：如果 `events.jsonl` 已损坏，repair 不能追加 `state_rebuilt`，也不应该只修 `state.json` 后宣称成功。应 fail fast：保留原日志、写 repair artifact，如果能安全写 state 则设 `needs_repair`。`state_rebuilt` 只适用于 `events.jsonl` 严格解析通过、但 `state.json` 缺失/无效/落后的场景。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:882:    "repair_reason": "state.json missing",

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-week-3-day-1-week-3-plan-d-2-timebox-day-1-day-1-8-4-p0-day--2026-05-30T09-57-40-097Z.md:570:`events.jsonl` is the authoritative workflow record. `state.json` is a rebuildable cache derived from the event log. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-week-3-day-1-week-3-plan-d-2-timebox-day-1-day-1-8-4-p0-day--2026-05-30T09-57-40-097Z.md:591:- `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-week-3-day-1-week-3-plan-d-2-timebox-day-1-day-1-8-4-p0-day--2026-05-30T09-57-40-097Z.md:3450:.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-1733-codex-next-steps-analysis.md:38:- The protocol requires atomic task claim under one `journal.lock`, but `.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_task.py` releases the lock after checking and then calls `append_event`, which reacquires it. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1-step-2-get-api-approvals-python-api-view-get-permiss-2026-05-30T17-03-29-001Z.md:470:- New event ids MUST be allocated while holding `locks/journal.lock`.

The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1-step-2-get-api-approvals-python-api-view-get-permiss-2026-05-30T17-03-29-001Z.md:587:Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1-step-2-get-api-approvals-python-api-view-get-permiss-2026-05-30T17-03-29-001Z.md:591:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1-step-2-get-api-approvals-python-api-view-get-permiss-2026-05-30T17-03-29-001Z.md:593:If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-omc-collaboration-state-json-events-jsonl-claude-md-c-2026-05-30T07-59-14-630Z.md:2649:+++ b/.omc/collaboration/state.json
.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-1733-codex-next-steps-analysis.md:38:- The protocol requires atomic task claim under one `journal.lock`, but `.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_task.py` releases the lock after checking and then calls `append_event`, which reacquires it. That reopens the race the P0 rule was meant to close.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:470:- `state.json`: current shared workflow state.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:471:- `events.jsonl`: append-only event log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:494:`state.json` is the latest compact state snapshot. It must remain valid JSON.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:496:`events.jsonl` is the authoritative workflow record. `state.json` is a rebuildable cache derived from the event log. Agents MUST NOT treat `state.json` as more authoritative than `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:517:- `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:524:- Any operation that writes `state.json` MUST hold `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:525:- Agents MUST write state updates to `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:528:- After any event append, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:532:`events.jsonl` is append-only and is the source of truth for workflow state and event ordering. Each line is one valid JSON object. Do not rewrite previous events unless the user explicitly requests repair of a malformed log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:556:- New event ids MUST be allocated while holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:557:- The next id MUST be computed as `max(event.id) + 1` from the valid events already present in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:558:- Agents MUST NOT allocate event ids from `state.json.last_event_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:559:- After appending an event, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:598:1. Acquire `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:599:2. Validate `events.jsonl` and reconstruct the task lifecycle from events for the target `task_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:601:4. If an active owner exists, abort the claim, release `locks/journal.lock`, and report the owner.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:602:5. If the task is open or recovered, append a `task_claimed` event while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:603:6. Update `state.json.active_agent`, `state.json.current_task`, `state.json.status`, and `state.json.last_event_id` while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:604:7. Validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json`, then release `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:637:  "resource": "state.json",
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:647:Any operation that appends to `events.jsonl` or writes `state.json` MUST first acquire `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:652:mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:657:The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:669:The lock owner MUST hold `journal.lock` for the full read-check-write-validation sequence covering `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:673:Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:675:If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. The rebuild MUST use the atomic state write procedure, and the agent MUST append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:677:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:679:If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST preserve the original log, create a repair artifact describing the malformed line and proposed repair, and set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:690:4. Update `state.json` with the current task, status, active agent, and last event id.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-step-2-docs-discussions-week3-day3-planning-2026-05-30-10-cl-2026-05-30T17-08-12-927Z.md:699:Completion should write a `completed` event and update `state.json.status` to `completed` unless the workflow remains open for the other agent.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:360:   - state.json is a disposable cache that can be rebuilt from events.jsonl

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:363:2. **Required atomic journal.lock for all event/state writes**
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:364:   - Use `mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock` for atomic acquisition
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:365:   - Lock directory must contain `owner.json` with agent, task_id, timestamps
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:366:   - Lock must be held for all operations that modify events.jsonl or state.json
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:370:   - Compute `next_id = max(event.id) + 1` from events.jsonl, NOT from state.json
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:371:   - Allocation must happen while holding journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:372:   - After append, `state.json.last_event_id` must equal max event id in log
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:380:   - Before claiming task, acquire journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:381:   - Reconstruct current task lifecycle state from events.jsonl
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:387:6. **Atomic state.json writes via temp file + rename**
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:388:   - Write to `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:391:   - This prevents partial writes from corrupting state.json
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:463:   - Acquire `locks/journal.lock` with `mkdir`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:482:**Atomic state.json writes:** Moved from P1 to P0 because state.json must not be left malformed even though it's rebuildable.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:510:The protocol is a workable MVP for low-frequency Claude-Codex handoff, but it currently relies on social compliance for the files with the highest contention: `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. That is acceptable for a first manual test only if both agents act sequentially. It is not safe enough for production-like collaboration, because the exact failures listed in the task can corrupt the event stream or leave the workflow permanently stuck.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:512:The most important design correction is to make `events.jsonl` the source of truth and treat `state.json` as a rebuildable cache. The second correction is to define one serialized write path for shared files using atomic filesystem operations. These two changes solve most concurrency, recovery, and duplicate-id issues without adding a service, daemon, database, or cross-provider hook.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:518:This is a real issue, not just theoretical. The protocol says locks are advisory and says to use a lock when two agents might modify the same file, but it does not define an atomic acquisition operation, required write ordering, timeout, or validation step. If two agents append events and update state at the same time, `state.json` can point to the wrong event id, event ids can duplicate, and a later agent may silently build on corrupted state.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:529:Define a single shared write lock for `events.jsonl` + `state.json`: `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`. Acquire it atomically before any write that changes either file.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:533:- Preferred: `mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:534:- Alternative: create a lock file with noclobber semantics, for example `set -C; > locks/journal.lock`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:547:Any operation that appends to `events.jsonl` or writes `state.json` MUST first acquire `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:552:mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:557:The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:569:The lock owner MUST remove the lock after validating the write. If the lock is older than 15 minutes and `heartbeat_at` has not changed, another agent may recover it by moving the directory to `locks/stale/journal.lock.<timestamp>` after user-visible notice or explicit task-artifact documentation. The recovering agent MUST append a `lock_recovered` event after acquiring a new journal lock.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:576:This is a real issue. Reading `state.json.last_event_id`, adding one, and appending is unsafe under concurrency. It also makes the cache authoritative over the log, which is backwards: the append-only log should be authoritative.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:582:Keep numeric `id`, but allocate it only while holding the journal lock. Compute the next id from `events.jsonl`, not `state.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:588:5. Atomically rewrite `state.json` as a snapshot of the resulting workflow state.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:594:- If `state.json.last_event_id` differs from max event id, repair `state.json` from the log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:606:- `events.jsonl` is the source of truth for event ordering.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:608:- New event ids MUST be allocated while holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:609:- The next id MUST be computed from the maximum valid `id` in `events.jsonl`, not from `state.json`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:610:- After appending an event, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:662:This is a real production-readiness gap. The current protocol has no heartbeat, lease, partial-write handling, or recovery mode. A crashed agent can leave a lock forever, leave `state.json` malformed, or append a truncated event line.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:666:- `events.jsonl`: append failures can create a malformed final line.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:667:- `state.json`: rewrite failures can make the whole snapshot invalid.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:672:Define `events.jsonl` as append-only and mostly immutable; define `state.json` as disposable cache that can be rebuilt from the event log. Require atomic state writes:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:674:1. Write `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:683:- If the malformed content is only the final line and clearly incomplete, a repair operation may move the original file to `events.jsonl.bak.<timestamp>` and rewrite a valid log, but only under journal lock and with a repair event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:698:`events.jsonl` is authoritative. `state.json` is a rebuildable snapshot.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:700:Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions. If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, rebuild `state.json` from the latest valid event and append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:702:Agents MUST update `state.json` by writing a temporary JSON file, validating it, then atomically renaming it into place.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:704:If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed line or duplicate event id, normal collaboration MUST stop and `state.status` MUST be set to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely. A repair artifact MUST describe the malformed line, duplicate ids, proposed repair, and whether historical log rewriting is required.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:783:- `state.json.last_event_id` equals max event id.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:808:1. Manually create `locks/journal.lock/owner.json` with old `created_at` and `heartbeat_at`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:860:- events.jsonl is source of truth

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1374: - `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1381:+- Any operation that writes `state.json` MUST hold `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1382:+- Agents MUST write state updates to `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1385:+- After any event append, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1389:-`events.jsonl` is append-only. Each line is one valid JSON object. Do not rewrite previous events unless the user explicitly requests repair of a malformed log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1390:+`events.jsonl` is append-only and is the source of truth for workflow state and event ordering. Each line is one valid JSON object. Do not rewrite previous events unless the user explicitly requests repair of a malformed log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1400:-- After writing an event, update `state.json.last_event_id` to the new id.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1402:+- New event ids MUST be allocated while holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1403:+- The next id MUST be computed as `max(event.id) + 1` from the valid events already present in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1404:+- Agents MUST NOT allocate event ids from `state.json.last_event_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1405:+- After appending an event, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1414:-When claiming a task, the agent should write a `task_claimed` event and set `state.json.active_agent` and `state.json.current_task`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1417:+1. Acquire `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1418:+2. Validate `events.jsonl` and reconstruct the task lifecycle from events for the target `task_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1420:+4. If an active owner exists, abort the claim, release `locks/journal.lock`, and report the owner.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1421:+5. If the task is open or recovered, append a `task_claimed` event while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1422:+6. Update `state.json.active_agent`, `state.json.current_task`, `state.json.status`, and `state.json.last_event_id` while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1423:+7. Validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json`, then release `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1444:+Any operation that appends to `events.jsonl` or writes `state.json` MUST first acquire `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1449:+mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1454:+The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1466:+The lock owner MUST hold `journal.lock` for the full read-check-write-validation sequence covering `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1470:+Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1472:+If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. The rebuild MUST use the atomic state write procedure, and the agent MUST append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1474:+If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1476:+If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST preserve the original log, create a repair artifact describing the malformed line and proposed repair, and set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1494: Completion should write a `completed` event and update `state.json.status` to `completed` unless the workflow remains open for the other agent.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1512: - Inspect `state.json` and recent `events.jsonl` entries.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1520:+- Hold `locks/journal.lock` for all `events.jsonl` and `state.json` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1553: `state.json` is the latest compact state snapshot. It must remain valid JSON.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1555:+`events.jsonl` is the authoritative workflow record. `state.json` is a rebuildable cache derived from the event log. Agents MUST NOT treat `state.json` as more authoritative than `events.jsonl`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1959:4. Update `state.json` with the current task, status, active agent, and last event id.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1968:Completion should write a `completed` event and update `state.json.status` to `completed` unless the workflow remains open for the other agent.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2019:/bin/bash -lc 'rtk python3 -m json.tool .omc/collaboration/state.json' in /home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2033:80:`events.jsonl` is append-only and is the source of truth for workflow state and event ordering. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2041:150:5. If the task is open or recovered, append a `task_claimed` event while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2042:151:6. Update `state.json.active_agent`, `state.json.current_task`, `state.json.status`, and `state.json.last_event_id` while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2361:+7. Validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json`, then release `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2382:+Any operation that appends to `events.jsonl` or writes `state.json` MUST first acquire `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2387:+mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2392:+The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2404:+The lock owner MUST hold `journal.lock` for the full read-check-write-validation sequence covering `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2408:+Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2410:+If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. The rebuild MUST use the atomic state write procedure, and the agent MUST append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2412:+If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2414:+If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST preserve the original log, create a repair artifact describing the malformed line and proposed repair, and set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2432: Completion should write a `completed` event and update `state.json.status` to `completed` unless the workflow remains open for the other agent.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2450: - Inspect `state.json` and recent `events.jsonl` entries.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2458:+- Hold `locks/journal.lock` for all `events.jsonl` and `state.json` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2476: - `events.jsonl`: append-only event log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2495: `state.json` is the latest compact state snapshot. It must remain valid JSON.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2497:+`events.jsonl` is the authoritative workflow record. `state.json` is a rebuildable cache derived from the event log. Agents MUST NOT treat `state.json` as more authoritative than `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2508: - `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2515:+- Any operation that writes `state.json` MUST hold `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2516:+- Agents MUST write state updates to `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2519:+- After any event append, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2523:-`events.jsonl` is append-only. Each line is one valid JSON object. Do not rewrite previous events unless the user explicitly requests repair of a malformed log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2524:+`events.jsonl` is append-only and is the source of truth for workflow state and event ordering. Each line is one valid JSON object. Do not rewrite previous events unless the user explicitly requests repair of a malformed log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2534:-- After writing an event, update `state.json.last_event_id` to the new id.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2536:+- New event ids MUST be allocated while holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2537:+- The next id MUST be computed as `max(event.id) + 1` from the valid events already present in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2538:+- Agents MUST NOT allocate event ids from `state.json.last_event_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2539:+- After appending an event, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2821:+1. Acquire `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2822:+2. Validate `events.jsonl` and reconstruct the task lifecycle from events for the target `task_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2824:+4. If an active owner exists, abort the claim, release `locks/journal.lock`, and report the owner.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2825:+5. If the task is open or recovered, append a `task_claimed` event while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2826:+6. Update `state.json.active_agent`, `state.json.current_task`, `state.json.status`, and `state.json.last_event_id` while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2827:+7. Validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json`, then release `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2848:+Any operation that appends to `events.jsonl` or writes `state.json` MUST first acquire `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2853:+mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2858:+The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2870:+The lock owner MUST hold `journal.lock` for the full read-check-write-validation sequence covering `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2874:+Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2876:+If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. The rebuild MUST use the atomic state write procedure, and the agent MUST append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2878:+If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2880:+If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST preserve the original log, create a repair artifact describing the malformed line and proposed repair, and set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2898: Completion should write a `completed` event and update `state.json.status` to `completed` unless the workflow remains open for the other agent.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2916: - Inspect `state.json` and recent `events.jsonl` entries.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:2924:+- Hold `locks/journal.lock` for all `events.jsonl` and `state.json` writes.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4026:    65	- `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4033:    72	- Any operation that writes `state.json` MUST hold `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4034:    73	- Agents MUST write state updates to `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4066:   105	- The next id MUST be computed as `max(event.id) + 1` from the valid events already present in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4067:   106	- Agents MUST NOT allocate event ids from `state.json.last_event_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4068:   107	- After appending an event, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4107:   146	1. Acquire `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4108:   147	2. Validate `events.jsonl` and reconstruct the task lifecycle from events for the target `task_id`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4111:   150	5. If the task is open or recovered, append a `task_claimed` event while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4112:   151	6. Update `state.json.active_agent`, `state.json.current_task`, `state.json.status`, and `state.json.last_event_id` while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4113:   152	7. Validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json`, then release `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4146:   185	  "resource": "state.json",

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4161:   200	mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4166:   205	The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4178:   217	The lock owner MUST hold `journal.lock` for the full read-check-write-validation sequence covering `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4182:   221	Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4184:   223	If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4186:   225	If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4188:   227	If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4544:+4. If an active owner exists, abort the claim, release `locks/journal.lock`, and report the owner.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4545:+5. If the task is open or recovered, append a `task_claimed` event while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4546:+6. Update `state.json.active_agent`, `state.json.current_task`, `state.json.status`, and `state.json.last_event_id` while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4547:+7. Validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json`, then release `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4568:+Any operation that appends to `events.jsonl` or writes `state.json` MUST first acquire `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4573:+mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4578:+The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4590:+The lock owner MUST hold `journal.lock` for the full read-check-write-validation sequence covering `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4594:+Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4596:+If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. The rebuild MUST use the atomic state write procedure, and the agent MUST append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4598:+If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4600:+If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST preserve the original log, create a repair artifact describing the malformed line and proposed repair, and set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:4618: Completion should write a `completed` event and update `state.json.status` to `completed` unless the workflow remains open for the other agent.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:185:- `state.json`: current shared workflow state.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:186:- `events.jsonl`: append-only event log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:209:`state.json` is the latest compact state snapshot. It must remain valid JSON.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:211:`events.jsonl` is the authoritative workflow record. `state.json` is a rebuildable cache derived from the event log. Agents MUST NOT treat `state.json` as more authoritative than `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:232:- `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:239:- Any operation that writes `state.json` MUST hold `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:240:- Agents MUST write state updates to `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:243:- After any event append, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:247:`events.jsonl` is append-only and is the source of truth for workflow state and event ordering. Each line is one valid JSON object. Do not rewrite previous events unless the user explicitly requests repair of a malformed log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:271:- New event ids MUST be allocated while holding `locks/journal.lock`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-independent-review-request-context--2026-05-30T10-02-12-891Z.md:273:- Agents MUST NOT allocate event ids from `state.json.last_event_id`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:107:`state.json` is the latest compact state snapshot. It must remain valid JSON.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:109:`events.jsonl` is the authoritative workflow record. `state.json` is a rebuildable cache derived from the event log. Agents MUST NOT treat `state.json` as more authoritative than `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:130:- `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:137:- Any operation that writes `state.json` MUST hold `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:138:- Agents MUST write state updates to `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:141:- After any event append, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:145:`events.jsonl` is append-only and is the source of truth for workflow state and event ordering. Each line is one valid JSON object. Do not rewrite previous events unless the user explicitly requests repair of a malformed log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:169:- New event ids MUST be allocated while holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:170:- The next id MUST be computed as `max(event.id) + 1` from the valid events already present in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:171:- Agents MUST NOT allocate event ids from `state.json.last_event_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:172:- After appending an event, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:265:mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:270:The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:282:The lock owner MUST hold `journal.lock` for the full read-check-write-validation sequence covering `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:286:Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:288:If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. The rebuild MUST use the atomic state write procedure, and the agent MUST append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:290:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-a-e-task-2026-05-30T16-22-43-345Z.md:292:If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST preserve the original log, create a repair artifact describing the malformed line and proposed repair, and set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:925:The protocol is a workable MVP for low-frequency Claude-Codex handoff, but it currently relies on social compliance for the files with the highest contention: `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. That is acceptable for a first manual test only if both agents act sequentially. It is not safe enough for production-like collaboration, because the exact failures listed in the task can corrupt the event stream or leave the workflow permanently stuck.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:927:The most important design correction is to make `events.jsonl` the source of truth and treat `state.json` as a rebuildable cache. The second correction is to define one serialized write path for shared files using atomic filesystem operations. These two changes solve most concurrency, recovery, and duplicate-id issues without adding a service, daemon, database, or cross-provider hook.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:933:This is a real issue, not just theoretical. The protocol says locks are advisory and says to use a lock when two agents might modify the same file, but it does not define an atomic acquisition operation, required write ordering, timeout, or validation step. If two agents append events and update state at the same time, `state.json` can point to the wrong event id, event ids can duplicate, and a later agent may silently build on corrupted state.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:944:Define a single shared write lock for `events.jsonl` + `state.json`: `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`. Acquire it atomically before any write that changes either file.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:948:- Preferred: `mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:949:- Alternative: create a lock file with noclobber semantics, for example `set -C; > locks/journal.lock`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:962:Any operation that appends to `events.jsonl` or writes `state.json` MUST first acquire `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:967:mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:972:The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:984:The lock owner MUST remove the lock after validating the write. If the lock is older than 15 minutes and `heartbeat_at` has not changed, another agent may recover it by moving the directory to `locks/stale/journal.lock.<timestamp>` after user-visible notice or explicit task-artifact documentation. The recovering agent MUST append a `lock_recovered` event after acquiring a new journal lock.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:991:This is a real issue. Reading `state.json.last_event_id`, adding one, and appending is unsafe under concurrency. It also makes the cache authoritative over the log, which is backwards: the append-only log should be authoritative.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-artifacts-20260530-0808-claude-response-to-2026-05-30T08-13-52-136Z.md:997:Keep numeric `id`, but allocate it only while holding the journal lock. Compute the next id from `events.jsonl`, not `state.json��备份 `events.jsonl`、`state.json`，也要备份/可回滚 `.claude/skills/.../collab_event.py`、`collab_validate.py`、`.omc/collaboration/scripts/` 和 `protocol.md`。但失败后不要直接重写 `events.jsonl`，除非明确进入 repair；正常回滚应是代码 `git revert`，状态问题通过追加 `state_corrected` 或锁保护下重建 `state.json` 处理。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-3-active-agent-gemini-claude-codex-active-agent-gemini--2026-05-30T15-44-10-615Z.md:2011:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:510:The protocol is a workable MVP for low-frequency Claude-Codex handoff, but it currently relies on social compliance for the files with the highest contention: `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. That is acceptable for a first manual test only if both agents act sequentially. It is not safe enough for production-like collaboration, because the exact failures listed in the task can corrupt the event stream or leave the workflow permanently stuck.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-3-active-agent-gemini-claude-codex-active-agent-gemini--2026-05-30T15-44-10-615Z.md:2034:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-omc-collaboration-tasks-task-20260530-02-implement-p0-amendm-2026-05-30T08-21-37-049Z.md:1113:任务已通过 `task_claimed` 事件占用，`state.json` 已更新为 `in_progress`。我现在会直接修改 `protocol.md`，尽量在原章节内补充 P0 条款，只为故障恢复新增一个章节并相应顺延后续编号。

That is acceptable for a first manual test only if both agents act sequentially. It is not safe enough for production-like collaboration, because the exact failures listed in the task can corrupt the event stream or leave the workflow permanently stuck.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:138:   - 不改真实 `events.jsonl` 行为，不启用 enforcement。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:147:   - 这里必须先做决定：canonical rebuild 当前日志后，最终状态很可能是 `blocked`，而现在 [state.json](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/.omc/collaboration/state.json) 是 `waiting`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:153:   - repair 内部不能调用会再次获取 journal lock 的高层 `append_event()`，否则有死锁/重入风险；要用“已持锁的低层 append”。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:179:需要备份 `events.jsonl`、`state.json`，也要备份/可回滚 `.claude/skills/.../collab_event.py`、`collab_validate.py`、`.omc/collaboration/scripts/` 和 `protocol.md`。但失败后不要直接重写 `events.jsonl`，除非明确进入 repair；正常回滚应是代码 `git revert`，状态问题通过追加 `state_corrected` 或锁保护下重建 `state.json` 处理。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:239:- 是否需要备份当前events.jsonl和state.json？
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:535:- `state.json`: current shared workflow state.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:536:- `events.jsonl`: append-only event log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:559:`state.json` is the latest compact state snapshot. It must remain valid JSON.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:561:`events.jsonl` is the authoritative workflow record. `state.json` is a rebuildable cache derived from the event log. Agents MUST NOT treat `state.json` as more authoritative than `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:582:- `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:589:- Any operation that writes `state.json` MUST hold `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:590:- Agents MUST write state updates to `.omc/collaboration/state.json.tmp.<agent>`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:593:- After any event append, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:597:`events.jsonl` is append-only and is the source of truth for workflow state and event ordering. Each line is one valid JSON object. Do not rewrite previous events unless the user explicitly requests repair of a malformed log.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:621:- New event ids MUST be allocated while holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:622:- The next id MUST be computed as `max(event.id) + 1` from the valid events already present in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:623:- Agents MUST NOT allocate event ids from `state.json.last_event_id`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:624:- After appending an event, `state.json.last_event_id` MUST equal the maximum event id in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:663:1. Acquire `locks/journal.lock`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:669:7. Validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json`, then release `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:702:  "resource": "state.json",
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:712:Any operation that appends to `events.jsonl` or writes `state.json` MUST first acquire `.omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:717:mkdir .omc/collaboration/locks/journal.lock
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:722:The lock directory MUST contain `owner.json`:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:734:The lock owner MUST hold `journal.lock` for the full read-check-write-validation sequence covering `events.jsonl` and `state.json`. The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:977:Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:979:If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. The rebuild MUST use the atomic state write procedure, and the agent MUST append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:981:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely, preserve the original log, and create a repair artifact describing the duplicate ids and proposed repair.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:983:If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST preserve the original log, create a repair artifact describing the malformed line and proposed repair, and set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:994:4. Update `state.json` with the current task, status, active agent, and last event id.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:1003:Completion should write a `completed` event and update `state.json.status` to `completed` unless the workflow remains open for the other agent.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:1009:- A `codex_ready` event in `events.jsonl`.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:3509:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:230:1. `state_rebuilt` 归 `STATUS_OVERRIDE_EVENTS`，事件 `status` 使用“从有效事件流重建出的最终 status”，不是信任损坏或缺失的旧 `state.json`。它的作用是审计 + 推进 `last_event_id`，不改变业务状态。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:3510:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:234:唯一补充：如果 `events.jsonl` 已损坏，repair 不能追加 `state_rebuilt`，也不应该只修 `state.json` 后宣称成功。应 fail fast：保留原日志、写 repair artifact，如果能安全写 state 则设 `needs_repair`。`state_rebuilt` 只适用于 `events.jsonl` 严格解析通过、但 `state.json` 缺失/无效/落后的场景。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:3515:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-codex-codex-5-a-1-owner-json-2-tmp-file-rename-3-read-2026-05-30T15-40-13-165Z.md:293:- 但state_rebuilt本身也需要写入events.jsonl

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:3559:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-repair-journal-lock-bug-collab-validate-py-124-python-2026-05-30T15-37-27-533Z.md:135:   当前代码会删除所有 lock。若 `repair()` 自己也持有 `journal.lock`，这个逻辑甚至可能删除自己的锁；如果其他资源锁还活跃，也会破坏并发协议。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:3564:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-repair-journal-lock-bug-collab-validate-py-124-python-2026-05-30T15-37-27-533Z.md:216:One nuance: if protocol compliance is strict, repair after rebuilding `state.json` from valid events should append a `state_rebuilt` event. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:3790:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-2-repair-journal-lock-bug-collab-validate-py-124-python-2026-05-30T15-37-27-533Z.md:3146:One nuance: if protocol compliance is strict, repair after rebuilding `state.json` from valid events should append a `state_rebuilt` event. The rebuild MUST use the atomic state write procedure, and the agent MUST append a `state_rebuilt` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:4346:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-3-active-agent-gemini-claude-codex-active-agent-gemini--2026-05-30T15-44-10-615Z.md:925:协议里目前确实是双 agent 心智模型：`state.json` 是可重建缓存，`events.jsonl` 才是权威记录；这会影响我对 `active_agent` 的建议。接下来我看一下当前状态和事件类型分布，确认兼容性约束。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:4348:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-3-active-agent-gemini-claude-codex-active-agent-gemini--2026-05-30T15-44-10-615Z.md:1000:If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1b-phase-1a-1-task-1-consensus-md-bug-2-task-2-consens-2026-05-30T16-09-16-383Z.md:5802:需要备份 `events.jsonl`、`state.json`，也要备份/可回滚 `.claude/skills/.../collab_event.py`、`collab_validate.py`、`.omc/collaboration/scripts/` 和 `protocol.md`。但失败后不要直接重写 `events.jsonl`，除非明确进入 repair；正常回滚应是代码 `git revert`，状态问题通过追加 `state_corrected` 或锁保护下重建 `state.json` 处理。

The lock owner MUST remove the lock only after validating the write.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:694:Agents MUST validate `events.jsonl` and `state.json` before using them for workflow decisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:696:If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:698:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-claude-docs-discussions-week3-day1-review-2026-05-30-05-clau-2026-05-30T10-19-43-667Z.md:700:If `events.jsonl` contains a malformed JSONL line, normal collaboration MUST stop. The agent MUST preserve the original log, create a repair artifact describing the malformed line and proposed repair, and set `state.json.status` to `needs_repair` if state can be written safely.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-consensus-discussion-context-claude-2026-05-30T10-13-06-444Z.md:905:If `state.json` is invalid but `events.jsonl` is valid, the agent MUST rebuild `state.json` from the valid log while holding `locks/journal.lock`. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-06-phase-3-consensus-discussion-context-claude-2026-05-30T10-13-06-444Z.md:907:If `events.jsonl` contains duplicate event ids, normal collaboration MUST stop. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:5967:`events.jsonl` is the authoritative workflow record. `state.json` is a rebuildable cache derived from the event log. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:5988:- `last_event_id`: numeric id of the last event written to `events.jsonl`.
